audit_input.task_goal: make the humanoid run forward while remaining upright and balanced

audit_output.reason: The humanoid moves forward but is highly unstable, flailing its upper body and struggling to maintain an upright and balanced pose. It never achieves a stable running gait and frequently appears on the verge of falling. This behavior indicates that the agent is prioritizing forward velocity and survival without sufficient regularization for maintaining a healthy, upright posture, as the 'healthy_pose' component is currently unweighted.
